title: courtenia heterophylla
intro: Courtenia heterophylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as a variety of celery or a wild celery. The medicinal properties of Courtenia heterophylla include its use as a diuretic and its ability to help lower blood pressure due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Courtenia heterophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the digestive system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through various methods, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
